title: The worktree escape — agent-ks writing outside its sandbox
description: Visual explainer of the benchmark's one real finding: the CLI's .env upward walk exits an agent worktree and resolves the tracker against the real repo. Anatomy, incident stats, and the two fix options.

artifact.purpose: Brainstorm-side explainer for deciding the fix (option A: boundary-stop in _env.mjs; option B: skill rule) before filing the follow-up issue.
artifact.data: Incident facts from agent-log/020_au_agent-benchmark/101_run-and-metrics.md — 2 independent reproductions (sonnet+skills, opus+skills), both self-recovered, zero residue in the real repo.
artifact.interactions: None — static explainer; site-mode theming follows the host light/dark.
